title: The Branded Swordsman
overview: Into a tavern walks a man with a massive sword, where he encounters a caged elf being bullied by grown men. Thus begins the strange partnership between the elf, Puck, and the swordsman, Guts.

title: The Holy Iron Chain Knights
overview: Guts is still coming to terms with his fateful encounter with the monk and his daughter when he is confronted by the Holy Iron Chain Knights. Their commander berates him about his many sins is declares he is to be brought to the Holy See...

title: Night of Miracles
overview: Guts and Puck are taken aback by Farnese's inability to see the elf. However, Farnese's refusal to accept anything beyond what she considers to be real in her world is about to be sorely tested.

title: Revelations
overview: Guts returns to a place he'd left two years ago to reconnect with old friends, but finds that someone he holds most dear has vanished. Guts tries to lay blame, but he is not entirely innocent.

title: Tower of Conviction
overview: Intent on finding Casca, Guts continues his journey toward the Tower of Conviction. Meanwhile, Farnese is already there, witnessing unspeakable horrors committed by those who serve the Holy See.

title: A Nighttime Feast: Burning at the Stake
overview: As Mozgus and his men continue their witchhunt for heretics, Farnese can't help but feel a twinge of doubt. Meanwhile, Guts unexpectedly encounters a familiar face, who brings ill tidings.

title: The Black Witch
overview: Guts is finally close to finding Casca, but Casca has caught the heretics' eye, and the Holy Iron Chain Knights are also homing in on the heretics' location...

title: Reunion in the Den of Evil
overview: Guts battles two powerful opponents. Isidro and Casca make an escape.

title: Blood Flow of the Dead
overview: Casca unveils her hidden powers, which attracts the attention of Mozgus. Guts is nearing Casca, and Luca meets a new entity.

title: Hell's Angels
overview: Luca learned all about the strange, egg-shaped demon, while Guts fought against Mozgus' followers.

title: Shadows of Ideas
overview: Guts is approaching Mozgus, while the strange blob is approaching the castle.

title: Those Who Cling, Those Who Struggle
overview: While the daylight is nearby, Guts and the crew have to defend themselves from the strange blob creatures. Nina runs into Luca.

title: The Rent World
overview: After encountering his old foe, Guts continues to look for Griffith.

title: Winter Journey
overview: Serpico recalls his history with Lady Farnese. Guts gets a visit from a mysterious, but dark presence.

title: Banner of the Flying Sword
overview: Griffith expands his army. Mule Wolflame meets Sonia.

title: Forest of Demonic Beasts
overview: Guts and crew are confronted by a mysterious person in the woods. Can they trust her?

title: Spirit Realm
overview: After reaching the witch's house in the forest, Guts and crew know where they have to go next after speaking with the witch.

title: Fight for Survival Against the Demonic Legion
overview: Shortly after reaching the village, demonic creatures are on their way. It's up to Guts, Serpico, Isidro and Schierke to hold their ground.

title: The Arcana of Invocation
overview: After Schierke managed to create a strong magical barrier, two strong creatures show up. Can Guts and Serpico defeat them?

title: The Berserker Armor
overview: While Guts is suffering from his heavy injuries, the only hope to defeat his strong opponent is to equip the mysterious armor hidden in the Witch's house.

title: A Journey Begins in Flames
overview: Guts puts on the Berserker armor and proceeds to fight Grunbeld.

title: Proclaimed Omens
overview: After a heavy battle, Guts and his crew reside on the beach, learning more about the consequences of the new armor.

title: City of Humans
overview: After arriving in a big city, Guts, Isidro and Schierke all go their own way for the rest of the day.
